author: J-Tech Japan, Inc.
name: Sekiban WASM Runtime Decider (Aspire + public container + Postgres)
description: An Aspire solution hosting the public Sekiban WASM runtime container with a Postgres event store: a Decider-pattern domain compiled to a WASM projector module, AddSekibanWasmRuntime AppHost wiring, sample commands/queries, and a smoke script.

IncludeTests.description: Include the xUnit domain test project.
